name: universal-updater
title: Universal Updater
description: Check and upgrade outdated packages across Homebrew, npm, pip, pipx, cargo, gem, and Mac App Store — all from Raycast.
author: BalajiTechLabs

commands.name: check-updates
commands.title: Check for Updates
commands.subtitle: Universal Updater
commands.description: View outdated packages across all package managers and upgrade them safely.

commands.name: upgrade-all
commands.title: Upgrade All
commands.subtitle: Universal Updater
commands.description: Run upgrade across all enabled package managers at once.

commands.name: list-installed
commands.title: List Installed Packages
commands.subtitle: Universal Updater
commands.description: View all installed packages with versions across all package managers.

commands.name: detect-managers
commands.title: Detect Managers
commands.subtitle: Universal Updater
commands.description: Show which package managers are installed on this system.

commands.name: export-backups
commands.title: Version Backups
commands.subtitle: Universal Updater
commands.description: Create and manage backups of installed package versions.

commands.name: search-packages
commands.title: Search Packages
commands.subtitle: Universal Updater
commands.description: Search and install new packages directly from registries.

commands.name: free-up-space
commands.title: Free Up Space
commands.subtitle: Universal Updater
commands.description: Run cleanup commands for all enabled package managers to reclaim disk space.

commands.name: system-health
commands.title: System Health
commands.subtitle: Universal Updater
commands.description: Run deep diagnostics (like brew doctor, npm verify) to ensure your system is perfectly healthy.

commands.name: security-audit
commands.title: Security Audit
commands.subtitle: Universal Updater
commands.description: Scan globally installed packages for severe security vulnerabilities and CVEs.

commands.name: ignored-packages
commands.title: Ignored Packages
commands.subtitle: Universal Updater
commands.description: View and remove packages that are currently hidden from update checks.

preferences.name: enableBrew
preferences.title: Package Managers
preferences.label: Homebrew
preferences.description: Check and upgrade Homebrew formulae and casks

preferences.name: enableBrewGreedy
preferences.label: Homebrew Greedy Upgrades
preferences.description: Include --greedy casks in Homebrew outdated checks and upgrades

preferences.name: enableNpm
preferences.label: npm
preferences.description: Check and upgrade globally installed npm packages

preferences.name: enableYarn
preferences.label: Yarn
preferences.description: Check and upgrade globally installed yarn packages

preferences.name: enablePnpm
preferences.label: pnpm
preferences.description: Check and upgrade globally installed pnpm packages

preferences.name: enablePip
preferences.label: pip
preferences.description: Check and upgrade outdated pip packages

preferences.name: enablePipx
preferences.label: pipx
preferences.description: Check and upgrade pipx-installed applications

preferences.name: enableCargo
preferences.label: cargo
preferences.description: Check and upgrade Rust crates (requires cargo-update)

preferences.name: enableGem
preferences.label: gem
preferences.description: Check and upgrade outdated Ruby gems

preferences.name: enableMas
preferences.label: mas
preferences.description: Check and upgrade Mac App Store apps (requires mas CLI)

preferences.name: enableGo
preferences.label: go
preferences.description: Check and upgrade Go module tools

preferences.name: enableBun
preferences.label: bun
preferences.description: Check and upgrade globally installed bun packages

preferences.name: enableDeno
preferences.label: deno
preferences.description: Check and upgrade globally installed deno executables

preferences.name: enableComposer
preferences.label: composer
preferences.description: Check and upgrade globally installed composer packages

preferences.name: confirmBeforeUpgrade
preferences.title: Upgrade Behavior
preferences.label: Confirm before upgrades
preferences.description: Ask for confirmation before upgrading one ecosystem or all ecosystems

preferences.name: showUpToDateEcosystems
preferences.label: Show up-to-date items
preferences.description: Keep ecosystems that are already up to date visible in the list

preferences.name: dryRunMode
preferences.label: Dry-run mode
preferences.description: Simulate upgrades without making actual changes (safe testing)

preferences.name: parallelUpgrade
preferences.label: Parallel upgrades
preferences.description: Upgrade multiple ecosystems simultaneously for faster completion

preferences.name: sortBy
preferences.title: Sorting
preferences.label: Sort packages by
preferences.description: How to sort outdated packages within each ecosystem

preferences.name: showUpdateDetails
preferences.label: Show update details
preferences.description: Display current and latest version numbers in the list view

preferences.name: autoRefreshInterval
preferences.title: Auto-Refresh
preferences.label: Auto-refresh interval
preferences.description: Automatically refresh package status at set intervals

preferences.name: notificationsEnabled
preferences.title: Notifications
preferences.label: Show notifications
preferences.description: Display system notifications when updates are available

preferences.name: backupBeforeUpgrade
preferences.title: Safety
preferences.label: Backup before upgrade
preferences.description: Create a backup list of current versions before upgrading

preferences.name: skipMajorVersions
preferences.label: Skip major versions
preferences.description: Avoid upgrading to new major versions (e.g., 2.x → 3.x) to prevent breaking changes

preferences.name: compactMode
preferences.title: Display
preferences.label: Compact mode
preferences.description: Reduce spacing and show more items on screen

preferences.name: showLastCheckTime
preferences.label: Show last check time
preferences.description: Display when the last update check was performed

preferences.name: customPath
preferences.title: Advanced Settings
preferences.label: Global PATH override
preferences.description: Fallback colon-separated PATH directories if auto-detection fails. Find current path using: echo $PATH

preferences.name: customPathBrew
preferences.label: Homebrew PATH override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for Homebrew. Find it using: dirname $(which brew)

preferences.name: customPathNpm
preferences.label: npm PATH override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for npm. Find it using: dirname $(which npm)

preferences.name: customPathYarn
preferences.label: Yarn PATH override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for Yarn. Find it using: dirname $(which yarn)

preferences.name: customPathPnpm
preferences.label: pnpm PATH override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for pnpm. Find it using: dirname $(which pnpm)

preferences.name: customPathPip
preferences.label: pip PATH override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for pip/pip3. Find it using: dirname $(which pip) || dirname $(which pip3)

preferences.name: customPathPipx
preferences.label: pipx PATH override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for pipx. Find it using: dirname $(which pipx)

preferences.name: customPathCargo
preferences.label: Cargo PATH override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for Cargo. Find it using: dirname $(which cargo)

preferences.name: customPathGem
preferences.label: Gem PATH override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for gem. Find it using: dirname $(which gem)

preferences.name: customPathGo
preferences.label: Go PATH Override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for Go. Find it using: dirname $(which go)

preferences.name: customPathBun
preferences.label: Bun PATH Override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for Bun. Find it using: dirname $(which bun)

preferences.name: customPathDeno
preferences.label: Deno PATH Override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for Deno. Find it using: dirname $(which deno)

preferences.name: customPathComposer
preferences.label: Composer PATH Override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for Composer. Find it using: dirname $(which composer)

preferences.name: customPathMas
preferences.label: Mas PATH Override
preferences.description: Manual binary directory path for mas CLI. Find it using: dirname $(which mas)
